41 _14A ADMTD_FROM_CD (14a) Admitted From Code CHAR 2 The patient's living arrangements prior to admission and the presence or absence of home health services if the patient was in a private home or apartment. -1 = Unknown, 1 = Private home/apt. with no home health services, 2 = Private home/apt. with home health services, 3 = Board and care/assisted living/group home, 4 = Nursing home, 5 = Acute Care Hospital, 6 = Psychiatric Hospital, MR/DD facility, 7 = Rehabilitation Hospital, 8 =
